top_findings.title: Deliverables written outside the workspace — archive contains no source, README, or tests
top_findings.evidence: run_dir has only TASK.md/logs/meta/scores; no src/*.ts. _agent_stdout.log lists files created at /Users/adriancockcroft/code/book-api/...; code exists only at that external hardcoded path.
top_findings.suggestion: Agent must create files relative to the provided workspace cwd, not a hardcoded /Users/... path. As archived, the run cannot be built or run and is not reproducible.
